name: Filter Clear Button
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Adding a clear filters button helps customers easily reset their search refinements and start fresh explorations. When shoppers can quickly remove all applied filters with a single action, you reduce frustration from over-filtering and help improve product discovery by enabling easier experimentation with different search combinations, which tends to enhance engagement and conversion rates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Filter reset functionality supports better search experiences by giving customers control over their refinement journey. This helps prevent dead-end searches and enables shoppers to pivot their product exploration efficiently, supporting better overall engagement and conversion through more flexible search interaction patterns."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/cbab954-Screenshot_1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/cbab954-Screenshot_1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "506", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#2. Requirements"}], "data-id": "2-requirements"}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard SettingsFor this module to work, you will have to update a few settings in your Dashboard."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Filter Settings", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You have to activate the filter in MD. We'll use the \"Brand\" filter as an example."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/5325512-Screenshot_2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/5325512-Screenshot_2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1272", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#3. Functional Overview"}], "data-id": "4-functional-overview"}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Components:[components/Facet/index.ts] https://github.com/findify/findify-js/blob/develop/packages/react-components/src/components/Facet/index.tsx"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#5. Integration Steps"}], "data-id": "5-integration-steps"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Within our filters you can add a button that will clear all checked items only for a specific filter at a time."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To do this:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Import useFacets to components/Facet/index.tsx"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create onReset method in components/Facet/index.tsx"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": []);"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Having done that, you need to create the button in components/Facet/view.tsx and add the onReset method to be called on click."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/Facet"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": " 0 } onClick={onReset} class=\"findify-clear-checkbox\">(Clear)"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Final version"}], "data-id": "final-version"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/Facet"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "/** * @module components /Facet */// default code import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';import { useFacets } from '@findify /react-connect';/** Props that Facet view accepts */// default code export default ({ theme = styles, item, config: _config, isMobile, isHorizontal, onToggle, openFacets,}: IFacetProps) => { const { update } = useFacets(); // default code const onReset = useCallback(() => { update('filters', f => f && f.delete(item.get('name'))); }, []); // default code return (
);};"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#6.
